title: scaphyglottis prolifera
intro: Scaphyglottis prolifera, also known as the False Tillandsia or Proliferous Scaphyglottis, is a type of epiphytic orchid native to Central and South America. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Scaphyglottis prolifera are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made by infusing its flowers or leaves in hot water to create teas or infusions for medicinal purposes.
